milestones.title: STUDIO FOUNDED
milestones.description: Gladiator Studio established as in-house game division of MetaWin. Mandate: build crypto-native, high-volatility slot content for MetaWin and third-party operators.

milestones.title: FIRST TITLE DEPLOYED
milestones.description: “To The Top” launched as inaugural slot — introduced the studio signature escalating-multiplier mechanic and established ULTRA-volatility market positioning.

milestones.title: CATALOGUE EXPANSION
milestones.description: Five additional slots shipped: Legend of Tartarus, Rise of Cetus, Star Nudge, Disco Dazzle, Sweety Treaty. Gladiator cemented as a prolific, quality-first content producer.

milestones.title: OPERATOR PARTNERSHIPS
milestones.description: Distribution agreements secured with Rolla and WowVegas. Gladiator catalogue extended beyond MetaWin to third-party platforms — B2B commercial model validated.

milestones.title: INFRASTRUCTURE SCALE
milestones.description: Feeder system upgraded for global real-time bet data. Live integration across 7 markets with sub-100ms round-trip performance benchmarks met in production.

milestones.title: 34 GAMES MILESTONE
milestones.description: 8 Gladiator slots + 26 MetaWin Originals live across the platform. Full catalogue available through single API integration for all operator partners.

milestones.title: GLOBAL ROLLOUT
milestones.description: Active expansion into new regulated markets. Additional titles in production. Aggregator partnerships in negotiation. Entering highest-output phase.
